recent_projects.name: CASSIA
recent_projects.summary: CASSIA (Cell type Annotation using Specialized System with Integrated AI) is a Python package for automated cell type annotation in single-cell RNA sequencing data using large language models.
recent_projects.author: Elliot Yixuan Xie

recent_projects.name: flet-webview
recent_projects.summary: Embed web content inside Flet apps via WebView.

recent_projects.name: flet-video
recent_projects.summary: Cross-platform video playback for Flet apps.

recent_projects.name: flet-rive
recent_projects.summary: Display Rive animations in Flet apps.

recent_projects.name: flet-permission-handler
recent_projects.summary: Manage runtime permissions in Flet apps.

recent_projects.name: flet-map
recent_projects.summary: Interactive map controls for Flet apps.

recent_projects.name: flet-lottie
recent_projects.summary: Display Lottie animations in Flet apps.

recent_projects.name: flet-geolocator
recent_projects.summary: Adds geolocation capabilities to your Flet apps.

recent_projects.name: flet-flashlight
recent_projects.summary: Control device torch/flashlight from Flet apps.
